title: Workforms - Pop Up - when response /answer selected
excerpt:

The pop up triggered by a certain survey response. Currently we have lots of options to generate addtional q…

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love the functionally to have a message or image displayed / pop up when a certain answer is selected.

The pop up triggered by a certain survey response. Currently we have lots of options to generate addtional questions etc but not a simple message shown. Hopefully not a big change from the current form design.
